intro: Sunlight spills over a wide, flower-strewn meadow. It is the perfect spot to stop, lay out a spread, and let your whole team rest and eat together.
title: The Picnic
description: A cozy meadow clearing made for a shared meal. Lay out a spread of food (Berries) - the bigger the spread, the more Candy and affection your whole party gains. A generous feast may even tempt a curious local Pokemon to wander up.
query: How big a spread will you lay out?

1.label: Light spread (1 Berry)
1.tooltip:
(+) A little Candy for each species
(+) A little affection for the party
1.selected: You set out a small spread and your team shares a quick bite...

2.label: Hearty spread (3 Berries)
2.tooltip:
(+) More Candy for each species
(+) More affection for the party
2.selected: You lay out a hearty spread and the whole team digs in...

3.label: Grand feast (5 Berries)
3.tooltip:
(+) The most Candy for each species
(+) The most affection for the party
3.selected: You unpack a grand feast and your team gathers round to share it...

4.label: Move on
4.selected: You take in the meadow for a moment, then move along.

shared: Your whole team shares the meal - everyone gains Candy and grows a little closer!
